title: scrophularia peregrina
intro: Scrophularia peregrina, also known as the Prolate or Wild Figwort, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia peregrina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it can also be found in various herbal supplements and remedies.
